title: AP Capital City Works — Contractor ESMP Responsibilities & Major Non-Compliances
text_english: The Contractor's RESPONSIBILITIES under the ENVIRONMENT & SOCIAL MANAGEMENT PLAN (ESMP) of this Project SHALL INCLUDE: (a) IMPLEMENTING all assigned MITIGATION MEASURES per the ESMP and contract documents; (b) ADDRESSING GRIEVANCES raised by the public during project implementation; (c) UNDERTAKING REGULAR REPORTING to the Project Management Consultant (PMC) and Environment & Social Management Unit (ESMU). MAJOR NON-COMPLIANCES include: (i) FAILURE TO OBTAIN clearances/permissions/NoC/Registrations/Consent under statutory environment and labour regulations; (ii) UNADDRESSED PUBLIC COMPLAINTS within the Contractor's scope, formally registered and communicated, within the time period set by PMC/ESMU; (iii) INADEQUATE SAFETY ARRANGEMENTS or compromising occupational safety / serious hazards posing high risk to lives of personnel on site or conditions leading to suspension of work; (iv) significant degradation of environment.
